markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.047 — Appeal

Chapter 524 (Administrative Suspension of Driver’s License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication) governs an appeal from an action of the department, following an administrative hearing under this chapter, in suspending or denying the issuance of a license.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Chapter 524 (Administrative Suspension of Driver’s License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication) governs an appeal from an action of the department, following an administrative hearing under this chapter, in suspending or denying the issuance of a license.
